about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a Full Stack Developer with over 18 years of experience in technology. For the last 11 years I have been specializing in Web Applications, REST API, Mobile, Windows platform development, and various market technologies.
about.description2: I use important modern patterns in my projects, such as Test Driven Development (TDD), Domain-Driven Design (DDD), Behavior Driven Development (BDD) and S.O.L.I.D, Clean Code and Clean Architecture.
about.description3: I have expertise in managing the software development lifecycle, covering needs identification, requirements gathering, software architecture, flow diagram design, coding, application testing and technical documentation.
about.highlight1Desc: Agile methodology implementation in startup, team training and coordination for agile model
about.highlight2Desc: AI projects using Ollama and LLM llama 3.2 vision for problem solving
about.highlight3Desc: DDD, TDD, BDD, SOLID, Clean Code, Clean Architecture, CQRS patterns
about.highlight4Desc: Infrastructure migration from Azure to AWS, GCP, Docker and Kubernetes
